content_body: My family and I wanted to get away for the weekend in the mountains. This was a great home for our family. Cabin Rentals of Georgia was very helpful and friendly. We had a small technical issue with the Google TV and the maintenance person was out there to help us within an hour. Awesome! We also appreciated the laundry soap that was available as well as dishwasher soap and trash bags. That was an added bonus! The little things count. We played games and hiked to waterfall and river trail. We really like Blue Ridge and look forward to going back soon!
title: So Many Added Bonuses and a Lovely Home!
